Localization.Description: A Kerberos Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) is denied because the device does not meet access control restrictions

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Kerberos Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) of the user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} is denied on host {event_src.host}. Reason: the device does not meet access control restrictions.
